title: Message
description: Sends an SMS or MMS message. Can be used during a voice call to send a text message to the caller or another party, or as a standalone action.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

to.description: The destination phone number in E.164 format.

from.description: The sender phone number in E.164 format. Must be a number provisioned on the jambonz platform.

text.description: The text content of the message.

media.description: URL(s) of media to attach to the message (MMS). Can be images, audio, or video.

carrier.description: The messaging carrier to use. If not specified, the default carrier is used.

account_sid.description: The account SID to use for sending. Defaults to the current account.

message_sid.description: An optional message SID for tracking.

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when the message send completes or fails.

examples.text: Your order has been confirmed. Order #12345.
